description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You must be in contact with the surface you wish to affect, or one directly connected to it. You send your Chakra into the area, causing violent tremors. The effects are identical to those of Genzou Jishin, except subjects cannot make a Will save to disbelieve, and the damage is earth damage rather than nonlethal.

Creatures in the area cannot concentrate (as the Concentration skill, extraordinarily violent motion). The technique's other effects depend on the surface each creature is standing on, near or under, as Genzou Jishin no Jutsu (p131), with the following exceptions:

Open Ground: When the fissures grind shut, instead of dealing nonlethal damage, any creature caught inside of them dies.

Structure: Any structure caught within the area takes 100 damage. (Generally enough to collapse a wooden or masonry building, but not a stone or reinforced masonry building)

River, Lake or Marsh: Fissures open underneath the water, draining the water away. Marshlands become quicksand, sucking down creatures and structures. Creatures receive a Reflex save (DC 15) to avoid being sucked down. When the technique ends, the waters rush back in, potentially drowning those caught.
